title: G&T Ore Growth AoA - Divine Support
description: This is a mod that adds support for Advent of Ascension (Nevermine) and DivineRPG to work with Ore Growth.
body:
This is a mod that adds support for Advent of Ascension (Nevermine) and DivineRPG to work with Ore Growth should you have them installed.

It makes this:

https://modrinth.com/mod/ore-growth/versions

Work for these:

https://modrinth.com/mod/adventofascension  *Excluding bone ores

https://modrinth.com/mod/divinerpg

This mod will do nothing alone without Ore Growth and at least one of the two others installed.
